title: Santram Mandir
tagline: Santram Mandir — spiritual town of Gujarat

overview.short: Santram Mandir is a Hindu temple in Nadiad, Gujarat, India.
overview.description: Santram Mandir is a Hindu temple in Nadiad, Gujarat, India. It is run by the Santram Maharaj organization.

nearestAirport.name: Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Nadiad
topPlaces.description: Nadiad is a city in the state of Gujarat, India and the administrative centre of the Kheda district. It is known for the Santram Mandir, the Mai Mandir; It is the birthplace of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, the first Deputy Prime Minister of India.

topPlaces.name: Uttarsanda
topPlaces.description: Uttarsanda, also spelled Utarsanda, is a village in Nadiad Metropolitan Urban Region of Kheda district, Gujarat, India. It is well known for its snacks industry.

topPlaces.name: Davda
topPlaces.description: Davda is a panchayat village in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is part of Nadiad (rural) Taluka of Kheda district.

topPlaces.name: Chaklasi
topPlaces.description: Chaklasi is a Town and a municipality in Kheda district in the state of Gujarat, India. Nearest City is a Nadiad.

topPlaces.name: Boriavi
topPlaces.description: Boriavi is a city in Anand district in the state of Gujarat, India.

items.note: Nadiad is a city in the state of Gujarat, India and the administrative centre of the Kheda district. It is known for the Santram Mandir, the Mai Mandir; It is the birthplace of Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel, the first Deputy Prime Minister of India.
Uttarsanda, also spelled Utarsanda, is a village in Nadiad Metropolitan Urban Region of Kheda district, Gujarat, India. It is well known for its snacks industry.
Davda is a panchayat village in the Indian state of Gujarat. It is part of Nadiad (rural) Taluka of Kheda district.
Chaklasi is a Town and a municipality in Kheda district in the state of Gujarat, India. Nearest City is a Nadiad.
Boriavi is a city in Anand district in the state of Gujarat, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Santram Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Santram Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Santram Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (49 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (46 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Santram Mandir?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Santram Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Santram Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Santram Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Santram Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Nadiad, Uttarsanda, Davda, Chaklasi, Boriavi.
